channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Rust (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Rust nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 🦀 ultraworkers/claw-code (189091 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: ultraworkers

📝 Repository: ultraworkers/claw-code

📄 Descrizione: The repo is finally unlocked. enjoy the party! The fastest repo in history to surpass 100K stars ⭐. Join Discord: https://discord.gg/5TUQKqFWd Built in Rust using oh-my-codex.

⭐ Stelle: 189091

🍴 Forks: 109456

💻 Linguaggio: Rust

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-03-31T08:58:08Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-29T05:24:15Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 🦀 therealaleph/MasterHttpRelayVPN-RUST (2137 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: therealaleph

📝 Repository: therealaleph/MasterHttpRelayVPN-RUST

📄 Descrizione: Rust port of @masterking32's MasterHttpRelayVPN — all credit to @masterking32 for the original idea and Python implementation. Free DPI bypass via a Google Apps Script relay with TLS SNI concealment. CLI + cross-platform desktop UI, HTTP + SOCKS5 proxy, no runtime deps.

⭐ Stelle: 2137

🍴 Forks: 302

💻 Linguaggio: Rust

🏷️ Topics: anti-censorship censorship-circumvention cross-platform desktop-app domain-fronting dpi-bypass egui google-apps-script gui http-proxy iran mitm proxy rust sni socks5 tls

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-04-21T14:46:31Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-05-09T04:58:09Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 🦀 NVlabs/cuda-oxide (860 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: NVlabs

📝 Repository: NVlabs/cuda-oxide

📄 Descrizione: cuda-oxide is an experimental Rust-to-CUDA compiler that lets you write (SIMT) GPU kernels in safe(ish), idiomatic Rust. It compiles standard Rust code directly to PTX — no DSLs, no foreign language bindings, just Rust.

⭐ Stelle: 860

🍴 Forks: 44

💻 Linguaggio: Rust

🏷️ Topics: async compiler-backend cuda gpu heterogeneous-computing high-performance-computing nvidia programming-languages rust

📜 Licenza: Apache License 2.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-04-22T17:03:09Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-05-09T05:16:53Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 🦀 therealaleph/sni-spoofing-rust (365 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: therealaleph

📝 Repository: therealaleph/sni-spoofing-rust

📄 Descrizione: DPI bypass via fake TLS ClientHello injection with wrong TCP sequence number. Rust port of @patterniha's SNI-Spoofing. Linux, macOS, Windows. Works with v2ray/xray VLESS configs behind Cloudflare.

⭐ Stelle: 365

🍴 Forks: 36

💻 Linguaggio: Rust

🏷️ Topics: censorship-circumvention cloudflare dpi-bypass proxy rust sni-spoofing tcp v2ray vless xray

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-04-13T22:39:41Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-05-08T19:16:38Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.description:
👤 Owner: gordonmurray

📝 Repository: gordonmurray/firnflow

📄 Descrizione: The cost efficiency of S3 with the speed of local RAM. A multi-tenant vector and full-text search engine featuring a tiered RAM → NVMe → S3 architecture for microsecond latency on top of object storage

⭐ Stelle: 339

💻 Linguaggio: Rust

📄 Descrizione: Free, open-source AWS emulator. LocalStack alternative: 33 services, 2,422 operations, 100% conformance. No account, no auth token, no paid tier.

⭐ Stelle: 271

🍴 Forks: 15

💻 Linguaggio: Rust

item.title: 🦀 PentHertz/LUKSbox (253 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: PentHertz

📝 Repository: PentHertz/LUKSbox

📄 Descrizione: Store sensitive files in the cloud, or on shared media without trusting the host. LUKSbox is a Rust-based encrypted-container tool with passphrase, FIDO2 (YubiKey, Titan, Nitrokey, Windows Hello), TPM 2.0, and hybrid post-quantum (ML-KEM-768 / 1024) keyslots. Mounts as a real drive on Linux, macOS, and Windows.

⭐ Stelle: 253

🍴 Forks: 19

💻 Linguaggio: Rust

🏷️ Topics: encryption file secure sensitive-data vault

📜 Licenza: Apache License 2.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-05-06T21:47:11Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-05-09T05:17:16Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub
